label: Beam search & constrained decoding

node.label: Beam search & constrained decoding
node.definition: Beam search retains a bounded set of high-scoring partial sequences, optionally applying lexical, grammar, length, or domain constraints during decoding.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Beam search & constrained decoding is to connect Search, sampling & decoding procedures, Autoregressive decoding to downstream capabilities including Code models, copilots & repository intelligence, Speech recognition & spoken-language understanding.
examples: substrate for Code models, copilots & repository intelligence
substrate for Speech recognition & spoken-language understanding
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Search, sampling & decoding procedures, Autoregressive decoding.

dependencies.rationale: Beam search & constrained decoding explores alternatives using the state, scoring, or search process in Search, sampling & decoding procedures.
Beam search & constrained decoding explores alternatives using the state, scoring, or search process in Autoregressive decoding.
Beam search & constrained decoding explores alternatives using the state, scoring, or search process in Constraint propagation, logic & program execution.
